| CU-002 | 18 mo | 9.1 kg | 0.12 mg/kg | **1.09 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 mo | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | **2.83 mg** | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

### PK model status
Based on the current dosing config, things look **stable at a high level**:
- all 3 compassionate-use patients have populated PK clearance values
- dosing schedules are defined and current
- patient notes do not flag acute dosing concerns

That said, this file only confirms the **latest configured parameters**. It does **not** by itself verify live runtime health or recent model validation outputs. So I’d phrase it as: **no obvious issues in the current PK-driven dosing configuration**.

If you want, I can also format this into a short report or email-ready note for Dr. Martinez.
